name: Functional Structural Alignment & Muay Thai Endurance
goal: Improve functional strength, correct postural imbalances, and build specific endurance for Muay Thai while rehabilitating shoulder and spinal asymmetries during a 5-week BPC-157/TB-500 healing phase.

objectives.value: Shoulder & Scapular Rehabilitation: Stabilize right rotator cuff and improve scapular tracking to support upper body function and Thai clinch work.
Pelvic & Core Realignment: Address rightward torso/hip shift by balancing QL tension, activating glutes, and strengthening the right-side abdominal wall.
Metabolic Base & Technical Running: Improve Muay Thai round stamina by developing a Zone 2 aerobic base with a focus on upright running posture and 'pedaling' mechanics.

monday.training: Pre-MT: Thoracic and Cervical mobility drills to reduce neck/ear pressure. Post-MT: Right-side abdominal isometric holds.

tuesday.training: Structural Balance A: Scapular retraction, external rotation (RC rehab), and bilateral glute activation (3 sets of 15).

wednesday.training: Lower Body Integration: Plantar fascia release (lacrosse ball), eccentric tibialis raises, and psoas stretching.

thursday.training: Active recovery: Diaphragmatic breathing and pelvic floor leveling to integrate massage work.

friday.training: Structural Balance B: QL unilateral stretching (left focus), eccentric calf raises (left focus), and upright posture drills.

weekDetails.training: Zone 2 Low-Intensity Run (40 mins): Primary focus on 'pedaling' footwork and upright torso. Avoid hunching.

sunday.training: Full Body Mobility: 60-minute deep recovery focusing on hip flexors, QL decompression, and neck relief.
